name: Red Velvet Cake & Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream eggs, sugar, oil, and vinegar in a large bowl.
2. Sift cake flour and baking soda together and add to the mixture.
3. Add flour while beating the mixture.
4. Add buttermilk slowly while continuing to beat.
5. Add vanilla and red food coloring.
6. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
7. Bake in three layers for 25 minutes, or until lightly spongy and done.
8. Frosting: Melt cream cheese and butter on very low heat.
9. Add powdered sugar, pecans, and vanilla to the melted mixture.
10. Mix well and spread over cooled cake layers, top, and sides.
11. If the frosting becomes too thick, add a little milk to reach desired consistency.
Makes: 1 3-layer cake
